---
title: "LEAF model"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
library(odelia)
library(tidyverse)
setwd(here::here("inst/examples/leaf_thermal"))

Rcpp::sourceCpp("src/leaf_thermal_interface.cpp",
  verbose = TRUE, rebuild = TRUE
)
source("R/leaf_thermal_interface.R")

pars <- leaf_thermal_pars()

lz <- LeafThermalSystem$new(pars)

lz$pars()
lz$set_state(c(25))
lz$state() # current state
lz$rates() # current dy/dt

ctrl <- OdeControl_default()

runner <- LeafThermalSolver$new(lz$ptr, ctrl)
times <- seq(0, 5 * 24, by = 0.1)
runner$advance_adaptive(times)
out <- runner$history() |>
  mutate(time = times, strategy = "baseline")

vars <- c("T_air", "T_LC")

out |>
  pivot_longer(-c(strategy, time)) |>
  filter(name %in% vars) |>
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = vars)) |>
  ggplot(aes(time, value, colour = strategy)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_bw() +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free")
```
